nasb.text: The sons of Issachar according to their families: of Tola, the family of the Tolaites; of Puvah, the family of the Punites;

esv.text: The sons of Issachar according to their clans: of Tola, the clan of the Tolaites; of Puvah, the clan of the Punites;

cnv.text: 以薩迦的子孫，按著家族，屬陀拉的，有陀拉家族；屬普瓦的，有普瓦家族；

ccb.text: 以萨迦的子孙有陀拉族、普瓦族、
